# NeuraGul

> NeuraGul is a New York software development and web design agency that partners with founders, small businesses, and teams to design, build, and run production software. Work spans custom software, web and mobile apps, AI, cloud, IT infrastructure, and data intelligence. Based in New York, NY and serving all five boroughs (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx, Staten Island); every inquiry gets a reply within 24 hours.

## New York

- [Web design & software development in NYC](https://neuragul.com/new-york/): NeuraGul's New York page — services, five-borough coverage, and local case studies (New York Mobile Mechanic, New York Fine Foods).

## Services

- [AI Consulting & Development](https://neuragul.com/services/ai-consulting/): Strategic integration and custom models that solve a specific business problem.
- [Custom Software Development](https://neuragul.com/services/custom-software/): Tailored software designed to meet business requirements and scale with growth.
- [Web & Mobile Development](https://neuragul.com/services/web-mobile/): Responsive sites and applications built with technologies teams can maintain.
- [Cloud Solutions](https://neuragul.com/services/cloud/): Scalable, secure cloud infrastructure that stays predictable as traffic grows.
- [IT Infrastructure](https://neuragul.com/services/it-infrastructure/): Server, network, firewall, and security work for businesses that need uptime.
- [Data Intelligence](https://neuragul.com/services/data-intelligence/): Analytics, visualization, and migration work that turns data into decisions.

## Selected work

- [PackShip](https://neuragul.com/work/packship/): AI-powered iOS shipping companion — sizes items from a photo, finds the right box with a real-time 3D packing view, and compares live UPS, FedEx, and USPS rates. Built with React Native, TypeScript, Three.js, Postgres, Redis.
- [New York Fine Foods](https://neuragul.com/work/new-york-fine-foods/): Cinematic site for a NYC catering, pizza-truck, and mobile-bar brand. Built with Next.js and TypeScript.
- [New York Mobile Mechanic](https://neuragul.com/work/new-york-mobile-mechanic/): High-energy site for a 24/7 NYC mobile mechanic with local SEO built to rank for on-demand repair searches. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
- [Vintus](https://neuragul.com/work/vintus/): E-commerce platform for a leading wine import company — inventory management, order processing, and CRM. Built with WordPress, PHP, Python.
- [Restaurant ordering portal](https://neuragul.com/work/restaurant-ordering-portal/): Commission-free online ordering that plugs into a restaurant's existing Square POS. Built with TypeScript, Square SDK, delivery APIs.
- [Real-World Data Pipeline](https://neuragul.com/work/rwd-pipeline/): Product Management for a 0→1 ETL pipeline standardizing real-world data into a Common Data Model for early cancer detection.
- [Landscape Drainage Proz](https://neuragul.com/work/landscape-drainage-proz/): Tripled a client's online sales via a Shopify storefront buildout paired with SEO, CTA, and Google Ads work. Built with Shopify, custom Liquid.

## How we work

- Discover — map the system, talk to your team, write down what we're really trying to ship.
- Design & build — tight feedback loops with working software; something usable in week one.
- Operate — support what we ship, fix what breaks, and hand off only when your team is ready.

- Email: support@neuragul.com
- Phone: (203) 685-9193
- Based: New York, NY (serving the five boroughs)
- Response time: within 24 hours
